name: @gcu/webmcp
description: Zero-dependency WebMCP bridge: connect Claude Code (or any MCP stdio client) to GCU browser surfaces over localhost. One bridge per app, per-app port, machine-global token.
author: Arthur Endlein Correia

scripts.smoke: node tools/smoke.mjs && node tools/smoke-fs.mjs && node tools/smoke-fs-bridge.mjs
